track_record.visibility_markdown:
## M-1 Outcomes

Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metric is excess CLV.
Outcome denominator basis: PA-valid settled player-market rows only; zero-PA and absent-boxscore rows are VOID.
Retroactive-grading note: CLV sign is rendered from captured closes where available; this is report visibility only.

### 2026-07-22 settlements

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 50 | 5 | 10.0% | 18.6% |
| Hits | 73 | 43 | 58.9% | 57.6% |
| HR | 44 | 8 | 18.2% | 15.3% |
| Total bases | 86 | 38 | 44.2% | 45.8% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=42/44 (95.5%); unmatched=2.

#### CLV-sign split

| Market | CLV bucket | Picks | Hits | Hit rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | negative/flat CLV | 32 | 5 | 15.6% |
| Doubles | positive CLV | 17 | 0 | 0.0% |
| Hits | negative/flat CLV | 46 | 26 | 56.5% |
| Hits | positive CLV | 27 | 17 | 63.0% |
| HR | negative/flat CLV | 19 | 4 | 21.1% |
| HR | positive CLV | 23 | 4 | 17.4% |
| Total bases | negative/flat CLV | 50 | 24 | 48.0% |
| Total bases | positive CLV | 35 | 14 | 40.0% |

Positive-CLV-and-hit names: A.J. Ewing — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Brett Baty — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; CJ Abrams — Hits 1.5 @ Bally Bet; Dillon Dingler — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Dominic Canzone — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Dylan Crews — Hits 1.5 @ BetMGM; Francisco Lindor — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Freddie Freeman — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Freddie Freeman — Hits 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Josh Bell — Hits 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Justin Foscue — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Kerry Carpenter — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Kody Clemens — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Luke Raley — Hits 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Royce Lewis — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Spencer Torkelson — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Trent Grisham — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Brett Baty — HR 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Dalton Rushing — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Sal Stewart — HR 0.5 @ BetRivers; Salvador Perez — HR 0.5 @ DraftKings; Austin Riley — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Dalton Rushing — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet; Dylan Crews — Total bases 1.5 @ theScore Bet; Freddie Freeman — Total bases 1.5 @ DraftKings; Kerry Carpenter — Total bases 0.5 @ theScore Bet; Kody Clemens — Total bases 1.5 @ BetMGM; Luke Raley — Total bases 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Rafael Devers — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Royce Lewis — Total bases 0.5 @ Fanatics; Ryan McMahon — Total bases 1.5 @ BetOnline.ag; Seiya Suzuki — Total bases 1.5 @ DraftKings; Shea Langeliers — Total bases 1.5 @ Bovada; Spencer Torkelson — Total bases 1.5 @ theScore Bet; Willson Contreras — Total bases 1.5 @ Bovada.
